sections.paragraph:
Original: גּלעדי

Transliteration: gil‛âdı̂y

Phonetic: ghil-aw-dee'

BDB Definition:

Gileadite = "rocky region"
  1. an inhabitant of Gilead
  2. a branch of the tribe of Manasseh, descended of Gilead
  3. of Jephthah as the son of Gilead

Origin: patronymically from H1568

TWOT entry: 356a

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
